name: teamwork-skill
description: Codex-first collaboration skills, with Cursor and Claude Code adapters, for research, local evidence, bounded and adversarial design, debugging, planning, review, setup, updates, and long-running goals; routine local work stays native.

interface.shortDescription: Ten focused collaboration skills for research, local evidence, design, debugging, review, setup, updates, and goals.
interface.longDescription: Teamwork adds ten focused collaboration skills for cited external research, read-only local evidence, decision design with an explicit budgeted adversarial strategy, unknown-cause debugging, executable planning, read-only review, explicit question-led challenge, project initialization, global refresh, and long-running convergence. Routine local inspection and authorized implementation stay with Codex's native workflow; no router or execution skill is required. You choose the scope and authorize changes; Codex remains in control of tools and permissions.
defaultPrompt: Use $teamwork-update to enable full Teamwork for this Codex plugin.
Use $teamwork-research to investigate this current external question from primary sources with linked citations.
Use $teamwork-design for bounded design; append adversarial with budget=3 for paired fresh critics and dual closure audit.
